record.text: I haven't seen a single piece, but in my mind I see it framed as a 3 legged stool of economic, safety, and government-tolerance. What I have read focuses on one leg and only mentions the others.

Last day on the colony. 🌿✨

In a few hours we’ll leave orbit and continue our journey. The work was rewarding, but the evenings were something special.

I’d happily come back here someday.

Until next time. 🖖💙
